caption: An older woman with short, curly gray hair and glasses is featured in a medium close-up shot, speaking while seated in a black office chair. She wears a red garment and gold hoop earrings. The background consists of a light-colored wall with a window and a tall beige filing cabinet topped with several stacked folders and binders. In the second frame, a green text banner appears over her chest containing the name "MICHÈLE D. PIERRE-LOUIS," with a smaller white text line below it that reads "EX PREMIER MINISTRE D'HAÏTI, CHAIR IEG." As the sequence progresses, she continues to speak, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting naturally between frames. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, maintaining a consistent focus on the woman as she talks.
